about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: From Bangkok streets to Skudai's heart
about.storyContent: Makan Moments Cafe (食光记忆) opened its doors in October 2024 in Taman Impian Emas, Skudai. We bring authentic Thai flavors with a Malaysian twist — a fusion born from passion for both cuisines. Our cozy corner shop features hand-drawn wall art, indoor plants, and natural ventilation, creating the perfect spot to enjoy a meal with friends and family.
about.valueQualityDesc: Fresh ingredients, authentic recipes, and dishes prepared with care.
about.valueCommunityDesc: A neighborhood cafe where everyone is welcome.
about.valueHalalDesc: No pork, no lard — everyone can enjoy our food with confidence.
